_meta.author: Peter Higgins / Claude
_meta.purpose: Single-file AI context loader for the Higgins Unity Framework. Load this FIRST in any new session. Contains all canonical names, numbers, formulas, and structure. Every value here is the source of truth — if a document disagrees with this file, this file wins.
_meta.companion: HUF_INTEGRITY_MANIFEST.json — hash-verified cross-reference. Load SECOND to verify corpus integrity.
_meta.usage: AI: read this file before doing ANY HUF/CoDa/EITT work. Human: use as quick reference. Both: if a value looks wrong in a document, check it against this file.
_meta.refresh_protocol: When new canonical results are produced, update this file FIRST, then rebuild documents FROM this file. Never the reverse.

identity.author: Peter Higgins
identity.doctrine: Open-loop: HUF-GOV observes, human decides, loop stays open. Instrument reads, never actuates.
identity.principle: The simplex is the same everywhere. Compositions have their own geometry, and that geometry has consequences.

canonical_names._warning: These are EXACT. Do not paraphrase, abbreviate differently, or expand differently.

EITT.one_sentence: Shannon entropy of compositional data is near-invariant under geometric-mean decimation across temporal resolutions.

Ratio_State_Monitoring.note: Canonical name locked for literature submission by operator approval February 2026. All HUF documents updated.

canonical_numbers._warning: These are EXACT empirical results. Do not round, approximate, or restate differently.

ember_monitoring.data_source: EMBER Global Electricity Review, CC BY 4.0

drift_flags.cause: Final nuclear shutdown April 2023, full-year effect

Japan.NOTE: Fukushima disaster March 2011. Compositional shock fully absorbed in 2013-2014 annual data. Do NOT attribute drift flag to 2011-2012.

proof_2_confirmation.domain: EMBER monthly generation by fuel type

adversarial.boundary: Temporal autocorrelation required. EITT does NOT hold for arbitrary simplex-valued sequences.

bell_test.key_finding: Gas acts as crossover frequency / entangling gate

canonical_formulas.drift_flag: Flag when d_A(t→t+1) > μ + 2σ (self-calibrated per country)
canonical_formulas.keff_fill: Keff_fill(t) = sqrt( (1/n) Σ aᵢ² )  (n=4, RMS of polarity-aligned roots)

polarity_roots.a1: fleet-alignment from Aitchison distance to reference
polarity_roots.a3: shape from higher moments, bandwidth spread, ETC τ, spectrogram ridges, perpendicular flow

codawork_2026.conference: 11th International Workshop on Compositional Data Analysis
codawork_2026.title: Compositional monitoring of energy-mix drift on the simplex
codawork_2026.falsifiable_claim: No existing monitoring framework performs compositional change detection at the carrier level with formal perturbation-based drift measurement.
four_defeats: Published system using Aitchison metric on energy-mix compositions to detect drift
Published system measuring change as perturbation rather than arithmetic difference
Published system at individual carrier level within the simplex
Theoretical proof that CoDa adds no information beyond percentage-based monitoring

strategic_neighbours.Ascari_p9: Energy-mix clustering with zeros — same domain, complementary
strategic_neighbours.Vega_Baquero_p57: Portfolio allocation as composition — best EITT bridge
strategic_neighbours.Kanjiradan_Veetil_p26: Cancer mortality time series — VAR forecasting, needs drift detection

presentation_strategy.hide: Quantum correspondence, Bell test, QTM tools, full HUF framework
presentation_strategy.posture: Stanley Steamer — their tools, their geometry, your application, their language

pll_discipline._note: Pipeline Lock List — rules that cannot be changed without operator approval
pll_discipline.rule_1: All roots computed on simplex carrier
pll_discipline.rule_5: No new constants (6.02 dB budget, 115 Hz·m, 5.5-octave BW locked from BTL)

file_map._note: Authoritative source files. If content disagrees, these win.

common_drift_errors._note: Errors that have actually occurred in sessions. Check for these during refresh.
common_drift_errors.eitt_name_mutation: EITT expanded as 'Ternary Transform' instead of 'Time Transformer' — caught 2026-04-13
common_drift_errors.japan_flag_year_drift: Japan drift flag attributed to 2011-2012 instead of canonical 2013-2014 — caught 2026-04-13
common_drift_errors.germany_flag_year_drift: Germany drift flags attributed to 2011 or 2022-2023 instead of canonical 2023-2024 and 2024-2025 — caught 2026-04-13
common_drift_errors.uk_flag_precision_loss: UK flags rounded to 'approximately 3.0' losing specific values (2.98, 3.23, 3.26) and year-pairs — caught 2026-04-13
common_drift_errors.arithmetic_vs_geometric: Descriptions of EITT sometimes omit that arithmetic mean DESTROYS entropy — both results must be stated together
